text:
Created attachment 178542
archivers/lua51-zlib update 1.0 to 1.1 + CONFLICTS_INSTALL

I'm not sure if this is really needed since I wasn't able to install the  archivers/lua-lzlib port with lua51. But if I understand it correctly it would be somehow possible and then these ports are conflicting since they both install 
/lib/lua/{VER}/zlib.so.

If I'm right with my assumptions please merge this one if not use the first patch.
